title: Welcome @ Net World
overview: An ordinary elementary school student, Yuta Akigawa was suddenly taken into the Web World through his cell phone. At that moment, he was met by the Web Ghosts.

title: Want to Go Home @ Can't Go Home
overview: Yuta who was suddenly drawn into the Web World was invited by PiPoPa to wander around this world. When he first looked around at the scenes, he was astonished. However, no one knew how Yuta could return to his world…

title: Let's Go To School!
overview: Today is Taro’s first day at the new school he transferred to but it’s such a high tech elementary school that he is totally bewildered by everything. Moreover, PiPoPa from the Web World are visiting his school’s website.

title: Hikaru, Pudding, Grandfather
overview: Hikaru, who is interested in Yuta, invited him to her house. However, Hikaru’s grandfather is hard to please. He has a PhD...

title: BiBoBa @ Appear!
overview: PiPoPa’s eternal Web Ghosts rivals are BiBoBa. Today, they challenged PiPoPa to competitions. Yuta is also being challenged to competitions by his classmate Kazushige.

title: Channel Wars
overview: Recently, Yuta and PiPoPa have slipped into the Net TV which has been the topic of conversation. They have gone around visiting various channels. However, a dreadful computer virus suddenly attacked!

title: Inn @ Yukitani's
overview: Recently the classmate, Karin, has been depressed. Her family business of running an inn hasn’t had many customers and it seems they will go out of business. Yuta and Hikaru wanted to make a homepage for the inn to help market it but for some reason, Karin’s grandmother doesn’t like the internet...

title: Yuta @ Company Visit
overview: In order to study about the societal structure, Yuta will be visiting Dream Future. However, he goes astray at the company and ends up in the basement. What does he see there?

title: Go and Work @ Aizawa
overview: A young part-time worker, Aizawa, turned up in Kamimai city. However, Yuta and Hikaru are worried since Aizawa is quite clumsy. At that time, a suspicious event occurred in the shopping district. Who could it be?

title: Mamoru and Yuta
overview: Today is Yuta’s birthday. Last year, he was able to celebrate with his good friend, Mamoru. Yuta asks PiPoPa if they can help him meet Mamoru through the Web World.

title: Operation! PiPoPa!
overview: Yuta is busy playing games with his friends when they hatch a secret plan.

title: Web Surfer Yuta
overview: Dream Future staff member Mr. Kazama is busy working on a mysterious new project... The Siren Project.

title: Hikaru! Web Drive?
overview: Hikaru follows Yuta into the closet where he suddenly disappears...

title: Star Festival! Version Up?!
overview: The Star Festival is approaching and the gang has to think of wishes.

title: Web Ghosts Large Gathering!
overview: Pit, Pot and Pat call upon Yuta and Hikaru to help them in the Web World because they are "in trouble"

title: Hikaru, Promise, Summer Vacation
overview: Hikaru reflects on spending some quality time at the beach with her family.

title: I Love Darling Ju
overview: Hikaru shows off her talent against Kazushige in a fighting game, beating him five times in a row!

title: Mamoru
overview: Seeking inspiration, Mamoru reminisces about a time when he and Yuta were looking up at the stars

title: Kazushige, Mid-Summer Dream
overview: Kazuhige becomes jealous when Hikaru wants to go to the festival with Yuta

title: Lost! Lost! Lost!
overview: A web ghost intervenes with the traffic jam

title: Sweeper, Hikaru
overview: Hikaru and Pat are cleaning up garbage in the Web World.

title: Kazushige and BiBoBa's Situation
overview: Kazushige accidentally enters the Web World and thinks its a dream!

title: Pu, Siren?
overview: Someone wants to erase Pu!

title: Pu! Pu! Pu!
overview: The Witch of the Web World reveals herself

title: PiPoPa, PiPoPaPu!
overview: Yuta, Pit, Pot and Pat embark on a dangerous journey.

title: I Like Everyone!
overview: Mamoru dreams about going to the Web World as a promise he made to his grandfather.

title: Web Ghosts PiPoPaPu?
overview: Yuta's friends in the Web World start to grow impatient.

title: Sayaka, Transfer Student
overview: Dream Future gets a new president.

title: Want To Be A Web Idol
overview: The school looks to the most popular web idol, Eri Eri

title: Slump, Poem, Dynagon
overview: Kazuhige becomes troubled by the two girls he likes, Hikaru and Sayaka.

title: Calculation, Bam, Pat!
overview: The gang seeks advice from Professor Sofue about a mysterious transforming web ghost

title: Hop, Stamp, Level Up!
overview: Professor Soufe begins to diagnose the virus that is infecting the Web World

title: Giga Panic!
overview: As things turn back to normal in the Web World, the students in the real world are traveling by train

title: Travel, Trouble, Love Love
overview: The Pistachio meteor shower is happening... and it's once every 12 years!

title: I Am Not Wrong
overview: Hikaru's grandfather has been hospitalized.

title: Web Venus
overview: Sayaka has been Web Diving and Yuta suspects she is Web Venus.

title: Mamoru, Yuta
overview: Yuta and Hikaru go to meet Mamoru.

title: Yuta...
overview: Sayaka suspects that Mamoru is Divine Forest

title: Program Siren
overview: While in the Web World, Yuta, Pi, Po and Pa hear a strange singing voice that shakes the entire world.

title: Together, Forever
overview: Siren is blocking connection to the Web World

title: Can't See You, Want to Meet You
overview: In the real world, life goes on but Yuta can't stop thinking about his friends in the Web World.

title: Legend Orichalcum
overview: Aizawa quits his job and reveals his true identity.

title: Web Detectives
overview: Yuta, Hikaru and Kazuhige, with the help of their friends, embark on a mission to find something tiny.

title: Divine, Labyrinth!
overview: Imbued with so much power, Mamoru questions his existence in the Web World.

title: Valentine Date
overview: Miss Eriko has a crush on Aizawa... and it turns out, he might just feel the same.

title: Karin @ What a Mysterious Country
overview: The Web Detectives take matters into their own hands.

title: Babbling @ PiPoPa
overview: Miss Eriko tasks the class with learning and writing a report about babies.

title: The Last @ Piece
overview: In the Web World, a baseball game is underway!

title: Adults @ Children
overview: Yuta, Hikaru and Kazuhige are invited by Aizawa to visit Dream Future.

title: @Save
overview: Yuta, drive by wanting to save Mamoru, decides to go into the Web World.

title: To the Web World @ With You
overview: Yuta, Pit, Pot and Pat have one more obstacle to get through before they can rescue Mamoru
